classes.label: Employment Unit
classes.description: Organization or unit providing employment and related benefits.
evidence: Main fields: 单位经济性 质码、单位提供的 待遇、档案接收地 址、接收地邮政 编码、工作岗位性 质码、单位行业码、报到证号、用人单位用 人形式码、派遣费

classes.label: Award
classes.description: Honor or prize received by an individual.
evidence: Main fields: 获奖项目、奖励级别码、奖励等级码、获奖类别码、奖励方式码、奖励名称、奖励名称码、获奖原因、奖励内容、颁奖单位、获奖日期、荣誉称号码、获奖角色码

classes.label: Disciplinary Action
classes.description: Punishment or sanction imposed by an organization or judicial department.
evidence: Main fields: 惩处名称、纪律处分码、惩处原因、惩处内容、惩处单位、惩处文号、惩处日期、惩处撤销日期、惩处撤消文号、惩处撤消原因

classes.label: Language Skill
classes.description: Proficiency in a foreign or Chinese language.
evidence: Main fields: 外国语种码、外国语种熟练 程度码、中国语种码、中国语种熟练 程度码、普通话水平等 级码

classes.label: Professional Qualification
classes.description: Technical title or professional qualification obtained through evaluation or examination.
evidence: Main fields: 任职资格名 称码、取得资格途 径码、评审单位、评定日期、聘任职务码、聘任单位、聘任起始日 期、聘任终止日 期、聘任情况码、解聘日期、解聘原因

classes.label: Post Certificate
classes.description: Certificate for a specific post or job role.
evidence: Main fields: 岗位证书名 称、岗位证书编 号、颁发单位、颁发日期

classes.label: Worker Tech Grade
classes.description: Technical grade or job title for workers.
evidence: Main fields: 工人技术等 级码、工人技术职 务码、工人工种码、等级发证机 关、等级评定日 期

classes.label: Position
classes.description: Job position or post held by an individual.
evidence: Main fields: 职务名称、职务名称码、职务类别码、职位分类码、职务级别码、任职日期、任职部门、任职方式码、任职原因、任职文号、任职批准单 位、职务变动类 别码、当前任职状 况、职务排序、主管或从事 的工作、免职日期、免职方式码、免职原因码、免职文号、免职批准单 位

classes.label: Social Part-time Job
classes.description: Part-time social duties in organizations like the People's Congress, CPPCC, etc.
evidence: Main fields: 社会兼职码、社会兼职起 始日期、社会兼职终 止日期

datatype_properties.label: Unit Economic Nature Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the economic nature of the unit.

datatype_properties.label: Unit Provided Benefits
datatype_properties.description: Benefits provided by the unit.

datatype_properties.label: File Receive Address
datatype_properties.description: Address where files are received.

datatype_properties.label: Receive Postal Code
datatype_properties.description: Postal code of the receiving location.

datatype_properties.label: Job Nature Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the nature of the job position.

datatype_properties.label: Unit Industry Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the industry of the unit.

datatype_properties.label: Registration Card Number
datatype_properties.description: Number of the registration card.

datatype_properties.label: Employer Employment Form Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the employment form of the employer.
evidence: 用人单位用 人形式码

datatype_properties.label: Dispatch Fee
datatype_properties.description: Fee for dispatch.

datatype_properties.label: Award Project Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the project that received the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Level Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the level of the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Grade Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the grade of the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the category of the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Method Code
datatype_properties.description: Form of the award, either honorary or material.
evidence: 给予荣誉或物质奖励 的形式

datatype_properties.label: Award Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Name Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the name of the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Reason
datatype_properties.description: Reason for receiving the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Content
datatype_properties.description: Specific content description of the award.
evidence: 获得奖励的具体内容 描述

datatype_properties.label: Award Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the unit that granted the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Date
datatype_properties.description: Date when the award was issued.

datatype_properties.label: Honorary Title Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the honorary title.

datatype_properties.label: Award Role Code
datatype_properties.description: Role of the individual in the awarded project.
evidence: 本人在获奖项目中的 角色

datatype_properties.label: Punishment Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the punishment given by a party organization or judicial department.
evidence: 指受到党和国家某级组 织或司法行政部门给予 处分的名称

datatype_properties.label: Disciplinary Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the type of disciplinary action.

datatype_properties.label: Punishment Reason
datatype_properties.description: Reason for the punishment.

datatype_properties.label: Punishment Content
datatype_properties.description: Specific content included in the punishment.

datatype_properties.label: Punishment Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the organization that imposed the punishment.
evidence: 给予处分的组织机构名 称

datatype_properties.label: Punishment Document Number
datatype_properties.description: Document number of the punishment issuance.

datatype_properties.label: Punishment Date
datatype_properties.description: Date when the punishment was given.

datatype_properties.label: Punishment Revocation Date
datatype_properties.description: Date when the punishment was revoked.

datatype_properties.label: Punishment Revocation Document Number
datatype_properties.description: Document number of the revocation of the punishment.

datatype_properties.label: Punishment Revocation Reason
datatype_properties.description: Reason for the revocation of the punishment.

datatype_properties.label: Foreign Language Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the foreign language, e.g., en for English, de for German.

datatype_properties.label: Foreign Language Proficiency Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the proficiency level in the foreign language.
evidence: 外国语种熟练 程度码

datatype_properties.label: Chinese Language Code
datatype_properties.description: Three-digit code representing the Chinese language or dialect.

datatype_properties.label: Chinese Language Proficiency Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the proficiency level in the Chinese language.
evidence: 中国语种熟练 程度码

datatype_properties.label: Putonghua Level Code
datatype_properties.description: Level achieved in the Putonghua proficiency test.
evidence: 参加普通话水平测试所 达到的等级

datatype_properties.label: Qualification Name Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the professional qualification title, e.g., 011 for Professor.

datatype_properties.label: Qualification Obtain Method Code
datatype_properties.description: Method of obtaining the qualification, either through evaluation or national exam.
evidence: 指通过专业技术职务任 职资格评审委员会评审 或参加国家统一专业技 术资格考试

datatype_properties.label: Evaluation Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the evaluation committee or authorized organization.
evidence: 专业技术职务任职资格 评审委员会或其授权的 组织机构名称

datatype_properties.label: Evaluation Date
datatype_properties.description: Date when the professional qualification was obtained.
evidence: 经专业技术职务任职资 格评审委员会评审或参 加国家统一专业技术资 格考试合格而取得的专 业技术资格的日期

datatype_properties.label: Appointed Position Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the appointed professional technical position.
evidence: 空白为未任任何专业技 术职务

datatype_properties.label: Appointment Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the specific unit that appointed the professional technical position.
evidence: 聘任专业技术职务的具 体单位名称

datatype_properties.label: Appointment Start Date
datatype_properties.description: Start date of the professional technical position appointment.
evidence: 专业技术职务聘任通知 和聘书所认定的聘任开 始日期

datatype_properties.label: Appointment End Date
datatype_properties.description: End date of the professional technical position appointment.
evidence: 专业技术职务聘任通知 和聘书所认定的聘任终 止日期

datatype_properties.label: Appointment Status Code
datatype_properties.description: Current appointment status of the professional technical position.
evidence: 当前专业技术职务的聘 任情况

datatype_properties.label: Dismissal Date
datatype_properties.description: Date when the appointment was terminated under abnormal circumstances.
evidence: 指非正常情况终止聘任 的日期

datatype_properties.label: Dismissal Reason
datatype_properties.description: Reason for dismissing the professional technical position.
evidence: 解除聘任专业技术职务 的原因

datatype_properties.label: Post Certificate Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the post certificate approved by a qualified unit.
evidence: 由具有岗位评定资格单 位考核并批准的岗位证 书名称

datatype_properties.label: Post Certificate Number
datatype_properties.description: Number of the post certificate.

datatype_properties.label: Certificate Issuing Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the organization that approved and issued the post certificate.
evidence: 批准并签发岗位证书的 组织机构名称

datatype_properties.label: Certificate Issuing Date
datatype_properties.description: Date when the post certificate was approved and issued.
evidence: 批准并签发岗位证书的 日期

datatype_properties.label: Worker Tech Grade Code
datatype_properties.description: Technical grade name obtained through evaluation or national vocational appraisal.
evidence: 指经工人技术考评组织 评审并正式批准或经国 家统一的职业技能鉴定 机构考核合格取得的技 术等级名称

datatype_properties.label: Worker Tech Position Code
datatype_properties.description: Officially appointed worker technical position name.
evidence: 指正式聘任的工人技术 职务名称

datatype_properties.label: Worker Job Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the worker's job type.

datatype_properties.label: Grade Issuing Authority
datatype_properties.description: Authority that issued the technical grade.

datatype_properties.label: Grade Evaluation Date
datatype_properties.description: Date when the technical grade was evaluated.

datatype_properties.label: Position Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the position or post.

datatype_properties.label: Position Name Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the position name.

datatype_properties.label: Position Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the category of the position.

datatype_properties.label: Job Classification Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the job classification.

datatype_properties.label: Position Level Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the level of the position.

datatype_properties.label: Appointment Date
datatype_properties.description: Effective date of the appointment by a party committee, administrative organ, or election.
evidence: 由某级党委、国家行政 机关及其组织、人事管 理部门正式任命通知时 间，或由某级人民代表 大会（或人大常委会）、 某级政协及人民团体会 议选举通过及决定职务 的生效日期

datatype_properties.label: Appointment Department
datatype_properties.description: Department where the individual is appointed.

datatype_properties.label: Appointment Method Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the method of appointment.

datatype_properties.label: Appointment Reason
datatype_properties.description: Reason for the appointment.

datatype_properties.label: Appointment Document Number
datatype_properties.description: Document number of the appointment notice or announcement.
evidence: 按干部管理权限，由某 级党委、国家行政机关 及其组织、人事管理部 门、人大常委会或人民 团体会议决定颁发的职 务任命书或公告的文件 编号

datatype_properties.label: Appointment Approving Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the organization that approved the appointment and issued the notice.
evidence: 批准任职并签发任职通 知的组织机构名称

datatype_properties.label: Position Change Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the category of position change.

datatype_properties.label: Current Position Status
datatype_properties.description: Current status of the position.

datatype_properties.label: Position Sort Order
datatype_properties.description: Order number of a leading cadre within the leadership group.
evidence: 指领导干部在领导班子 内排列的顺序号

datatype_properties.label: Supervised or Engaged Work
datatype_properties.description: Work supervised or engaged in.
evidence: 主管或从事 的工作

datatype_properties.label: Removal Date
datatype_properties.description: Effective date of the removal from position.
evidence: 按干部管理权限，由某 级党委、国家行政机关 及其组织、人事管理部 门、人大常委会或人民 团体会议批准免去职务 生效日期

datatype_properties.label: Removal Method Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the method of removal.

datatype_properties.label: Removal Reason Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the reason for removal.

datatype_properties.label: Removal Document Number
datatype_properties.description: Document number of the removal notice or announcement.
evidence: 按干部管理权限，由某 级党委、国家行政机关 及其组织、人事管理部 门、人大常委会或人民 团体会议决定颁发的职 务免职书或公告的文件 编号

datatype_properties.label: Removal Approving Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the organization that approved the removal and issued the notice.
evidence: 批准免职并签发免职通 知的组织机构名称

datatype_properties.label: Social Part-time Job Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the social part-time job in organizations like the People's Congress, CPPCC, etc.
evidence: 指县级以上人大、政协、 民主党派、工会、共青 团、妇联、侨联、科协， 中国科学院和中国工程 院院士的兼职职务

datatype_properties.label: Social Part-time Job Start Date
datatype_properties.description: Approval date of the part-time social duty appointment.
evidence: 兼职职务任命的批准日 期

datatype_properties.label: Social Part-time Job End Date
datatype_properties.description: End date of the part-time social duty.
